body:
Hotfix release that fixes a regression introduced in v2.18.0 which breaks GPU driver detection Changes: * `--ts-version` has been renamed to `--detect-version` * `general.detectVersion` in JSON config file Bugfixes: * Fix and improve GPU driver detection (#1084, GPU, Linux) ---
